e107Plugin.name: RFID import
e107Plugin.summary: Import of passing times from RFID chips
e107Plugin.description: Optional plugin of the race-timing suite. Reads passing records from an external RFID chip-reader database and imports them into the timing engine (racetiming's race_time table), mapped onto checkpoints via racetrack's race_point table. Independent: it installs on its own and declares no dependencies.
